# UOO KAY MECH INDUSTRIES

Precision Engineering & Industrial Fabrication manufacturer established in 2004, headquartered in Maharashtra, India.

## Company Summary
UOO KAY MECH INDUSTRIES is an approved Tier-1 vendor-supplier for large enterprise corporations (such as Larsen & Toubro, Emerson India, Godfrey Phillips, and Parle Elizabeth Tools). The company has 20+ years of expertise in high-precision CNC machining, turning, conventional milling, and heavy structural/sheet metal fabrication.

## Factory Location
- Address: W-184, MIDC Phase II, Kalyan-Shilphata Road, Dombivli East, Maharashtra - 421204, India.

## Contact Information
- Email: uookaymechindustries@gmail.com
- Telephone 1: +91 9987849605 (Sandeepkumar K. Singh, Founder & MD)
- Telephone 2: +91 9821876397 (Sales Enquiry)
- WhatsApp: +91 9987849605

## Core Offerings & Services
1. **Machine Safety Guards**: CNC machine guards, safety enclosures, telescopic covers.
2. **Precision Machined Components**: Crane shafts, pinion shafts, expanders, seal plates, weep tubes, chain mounting bolts, air testing fixtures.
3. **Gear Manufacturing**: Spur gears, custom module gear cutting, industrial gearboxes.
4. **Industrial Ladders**: Mild Steel (MS), Stainless Steel (SS304/SS316), and lightweight Aluminium safety ladders.
5. **Structural Fabrication**: Heavy structural welding, custom engineering assemblies as per customer blueprints/drawings.

## Production Assets & Quality Control
- CNC Machining Centre: ACE Micromatic AMS MCV450 (800x500x450 mm)
- CNC Turning: CNC Lathe MONO-200XL (Dia 300x550 mm)
- Conventional Equipment: Lathes (8ft & 6ft), Surface Grinder, Cincinnati Milling, Drilling/Welding/Cutting stations.
- Inspection Instruments: Mitutoyo Digital Height Gauges, Baker Thread Gauges, Granite & Cast Iron Surface Plates, Bore Dial Gauges, Micrometers, and Vernier Calipers.
- Registrations: GST Registered, MSME Registered, Udyam Certificate.
